ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant where the transaction occurred */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of the transaction amount */,
  "skewness" REAL /* Skewness of the transaction amount */,
  "kurtosis" REAL /* Kurtosis (curtosis) of the transaction amount */,
  "entropy" REAL /* Entropy of the transaction amount */,
  "class" INTEGER /* Classification of the transaction (0 for legitimate, 1 for fraudulent) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the transaction was initiated */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier of the device used for the transaction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the transaction */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Whether the transaction is part of a recurring payment */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Whether the transaction involves an international entity */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* The type of transaction (e.g., purchase, refund, transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "national_id" TEXT /* National ID or passport number of the customer */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer's account (e.g., active, suspended, closed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date and time the customer logged into their account */,
  "risk_score" REAL /* A score indicating the customer's risk level for fraudulent activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchants" (
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchant */,
  "merchant_name" TEXT /* Name of the merchant */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the merchant (e.g., grocery, electronics) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the merchant */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the merchant */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the merchant */,
  "reputation_score" REAL /* A score indicating the merchant's reputation for fraud */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* The date of the last audit of the merchant */,
  "is_high_risk" INTEGER /* Whether the merchant is considered high risk */,
  "average_transaction_amount" REAL /* The average transaction amount for the merchant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., high variance, high skewness) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  "severity" TEXT /* The severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* The user ID of the analyst assigned to the alert */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments regarding the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* The hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* The last date and time the user was active on the platform */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* A list of permissions or access levels for the user */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Whether the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
